aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data and conversational content gaps. They need stronger authority signals and AI-optimized content.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed business info.
Expand FAQ content with AI-friendly queries and answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can improve with more posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with an address discrepancy between the website and GBP.
action_items: Add the full address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants prioritize detailed, structured info.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema with service details and FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for ChatGPT and Google Bard.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks key schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Optimized Strategies
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google Bard.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
